MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Mitch Lyon, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
No appearance by plaintiff or plaintiff counsel.
John Richard Weinstein, Esq. for defendant Brenda Evans also present.
Being no appearance by plaintiff or their attorney, the court made a telephone call to Mercedes Gavin and message left on her answering machine. At 2:35 the matter was taken off calendar. Trial date is vacated.
